task: Find boys' shoes priced under $20 with a 5-star average rating.
final_result_response:
Based on my search on JCPenney.com, filtering for boys' shoes priced under $20 with a 5-star average rating, I found **7 results**:

1. **Thereabouts Toddler Boys Lil Jack Flat Heel Chelsea Boots** — $19.49 (clearance, orig. $65) — ★★★★★ (2 reviews)
2. **Reebok Atr Chill Big Kid Unisex Basketball Shoes** — $14.99 (clearance, orig. $60) — ★★★★★ (3 reviews)
3. **adidas Little & Big Kid Unisex Adilette Comfort Slide Sandals** — $18.99 (clearance, orig. $35) — ★★★★★ (3 reviews)
4. **PUMA Big Kid Boys Cool Cat Slide Sandals** — $9.99 (clearance, orig. $25) — ★★★★★ (3 reviews)
5. **Skechers Microspec Advance Little Kid Boys Sneakers** — $18.49 (clearance, orig. $40) — ★★★★★ (3 reviews)
6. **Stepping Stone Infant Boys Double Strap Footbed Sandal** — $15.99 (sale, orig. $24) — ★★★★★ (1 review)
7. **So Adorable Boys Sneaker Crib Shoes** — $12.99 (sale, orig. $18) — ★★★★★ (3 reviews)
